errors.description: The simulated governance decision differs from the runtime enforcement outcome.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny rollout until simulation and runtime decisions share the canonical decision path

errors.description: The runtime decision evidence was produced for a different tenant or environment scope.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny rollout until tenant and environment scope are identical

errors.description: The runtime decision evidence references a different canonical policy pack hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny rollout until runtime and simulation use the same policy pack

errors.description: The runtime decision evidence references a different canonical request context hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny rollout until runtime and simulation context are identical

errors.description: Simulation determined fail-closed behavior is required but runtime evidence did not fail closed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny rollout because unverifiable or invalid simulation outcomes must fail closed at runtime
